remaining_tasks.name: Plan 01 Task 1: [cloud] extras, config fields, ORM column, DB migration
Plan 03 Task 1: run_scan.py wiring (import + phase block + aggregation)
Plan 03 Task 2: cbom/builder.py Pass 1/2/3 extension for GCP and CLOUD_SQL

decisions.decision: Use google-api-python-client, NOT google-cloud-kms or google-cloud-storage
decisions.rationale: google-cloud-kms requires grpcio which is not installed and conflicts with the existing venv. google-api-python-client uses bundled discovery docs (all three: cloudkms.v1.json, sqladmin.v1.json, storage.v1.json) and has no grpcio dependency.

decisions.decision: session_start parameter on scan_gcp_targets() is discretionary for Phase 26
decisions.rationale: STATE.md ISSUE-3 says session_start is mandatory for all new scanners, but CONTEXT.md Claude's Discretion says follow aws_connector.py style (which omits it). Plan checker flagged as non-blocking; planner chose to follow existing connector convention. May need revisiting for Phase 31 trend analysis.

decisions.decision: gcs_scan_json goes in BOTH models.py ORM body AND _ensure_gcp_columns() ALTER TABLE
decisions.rationale: Research open question resolved: ORM declaration in models.py for consistency with cloud_scan_json; migration guard in db.py for backward-compatible upgrade from v4.2.

next_action: Run /gsd-execute-phase 26 (start fresh context with /clear first). Plan 01 Wave 1 runs first.
context_notes: Planning session only — no code was written. All 3 plans were verified by gsd-plan-checker (12/12 dimensions passed). The library choice contradiction in STATE.md vs CONTEXT.md was resolved: CONTEXT.md D-02 is correct (google-api-python-client). PQC algorithms (ML_KEM, ML_DSA, SLH_DSA) now exist in GCP KMS and map to existing classifier.py entries — no classifier changes needed.
